editorsPicks.title: 小黄人与大怪兽
editorsPicks.summary: 为了拍摄心中理想的怪兽电影，这群萌趣活宝四处物色演员，竟然真的集齐了各式怪兽，上演疯狂大乱斗！

comingSoon.title: 安昂传奇：最后的气宗
comingSoon.summary: 派拉蒙和尼克宣布“降世神通”系列开发三部新的电影，仍是动画形式。第一部由《降世神通：最后的气宗》导演Lauren Montgomery执导，《最后的气宗》主创Bryan Konietzko和Michael DiMartino担任制片人。

comingSoon.title: 蜘蛛侠：崭新之日
comingSoon.summary: 重建普通生活后，彼得一边在大学完成学业、一边从事兼职以维持生计，同时仍肩负着守护纽约街头的蜘蛛侠责任。然而，当一个神秘力量从内部腐蚀这座城市的安全与秩序，彼得被迫再次披上战衣。他必须在强大的敌人与昔日纽带之间找到平衡，并重新定义英雄的意义。
comingSoon.summaryEn: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to

comingSoon.title: 奥德赛
comingSoon.summary: 特洛伊战争结束后，伊萨卡国王奥德修斯踏上了返回家乡的艰险旅程。

comingSoon.title: 海洋奇缘：启航
comingSoon.summary: 海的召唤，从未停止。熟悉的旋律响起，属于“莫阿娜”的冒险，再次扬帆启航。
comingSoon.summaryEn: Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.

comingSoon.title: 鬼玩人6：燃烧
comingSoon.summaryEn: After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As one by one they transform into deadites, she comes to discover that the vows she took in life - survive even in death.

trending.title: 痴迷

trending.title: 福尔摩斯小姐3
trending.summary: 侦探伊诺拉·福尔摩斯前往马耳他探险，并打算在那里结婚，但夏洛克的失踪令其卷入一桩危险的案件。
trending.summaryEn: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

trending.title: 玩具总动员5
